COLORLESS_PANACEA.title: Panacea
RED_CORRUPTION.description:
Skills cost 0{energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
Whenever you play a Skill, [gold]Exhaust[/gold] it.
RED_CORRUPTION.title: Corruption
RED_DARK_EMBRACE.description: Whenever a card is [gold]Exhausted[/gold], draw 1 card.
RED_DARK_EMBRACE.title: Dark Embrace
RED_BLUDGEON.title: Bludgeon
RED_RECKLESS_CHARGE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Shuffle a [gold]Dazed[/gold] into your [gold]draw pile[/gold].
RED_RECKLESS_CHARGE.title: Reckless Charge
RED_WILD_STRIKE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Shuffle a [gold]Wound[/gold] into your [gold]draw pile[/gold].
RED_WILD_STRIKE.title: Wild Strike
RED_WARCRY.description:
Draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
Place a card from your [gold]hand[/gold] on top of your [gold]draw pile[/gold].
RED_WARCRY.selectionScreenPrompt: Choose a card to place on top of your draw pile.
RED_WARCRY.title: Warcry
RED_CLEAVE.title: Cleave
RED_CLOTHESLINE.title: Clothesline
RED_HEAVY_BLADE.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Strength[/gold] affects Heavy Blade {StrengthMultiplier:diff()} times.
RED_HEAVY_BLADE.title: Heavy Blade
RED_METALLICIZE.description: At the end of your turn, gain {RedMetallicizePower:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
RED_METALLICIZE.title: Metallicize
RED_PUMMEL.title: Pummel
RED_SEARING_BLOW.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Can be upgraded multiple times.
RED_SEARING_BLOW.title: Searing Blow
RED_SHOCKWAVE.title: Shockwave
RED_FIRE_BREATHING.title: Fire Breathing
RED_FIRE_BREATHING.description: Whenever you draw a [gold]Status[/gold] or [gold]Curse[/gold], deal {RedFireBreathingPower:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
RED_COMBUST.title: Combust
RED_COMBUST.description: At the end of your turn, lose 1 HP and deal {RedCombustPower:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
RED_DROP_KICK.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If the enemy is [gold]Vulnerable[/gold], gain {Energy:energyIcons()} and draw 1 card.
RED_DROP_KICK.title: Dropkick
RED_CARNAGE.title: Carnage
RED_BLOOD_FOR_BLOOD.description:
This card costs {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} less for each time you lose HP in combat.
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
RED_BLOOD_FOR_BLOOD.title: Blood for Blood
RED_SEVER_SOUL.description: [gold]Exhaust[/gold] all non-Attack cards in your [gold]hand[/gold]. Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
RED_SEVER_SOUL.title: Sever Soul
RED_IMMOLATE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Add a [gold]Burn[/gold] to your [gold]discard pile[/gold].
RED_IMMOLATE.title: Immolate
RED_REAPER.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Heal HP equal to unblocked damage dealt.
RED_REAPER.title: Reaper
RED_DISARM.title: Disarm
RED_INTIMIDATE.title: Intimidate
RED_EXHUME.selectionScreenPrompt: Choose a card to add to your hand.
RED_EXHUME.description: Choose an [gold]Exhausted[/gold] card and add it to your [gold]hand[/gold].
RED_EXHUME.title: Exhume
RED_SEEING_RED.title: Seeing Red
RED_SENTINEL.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
If this card is [gold]Exhausted[/gold], gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
RED_SENTINEL.title: Sentinel
RED_GHOSTLY_ARMOR.title: Ghostly Armor
RED_POWER_THROUGH.title: Power Through
RED_FLEX.title: Flex
RED_SPOT_WEAKNESS.description:
If the enemy intends to attack,
you gain {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold].
RED_SPOT_WEAKNESS.title: Spot Weakness
RED_LIMIT_BREAK.title: Limit Break
RED_EVOLVE.description: Whenever you draw a [gold]Status[/gold] card, draw {RedEvolvePower:diff()} cards.
RED_EVOLVE.title: Evolve
RED_BERSERK.description:
Gain {VulnerablePower:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
At the start of your turn gain {Energy:energyIcons()}
RED_BERSERK.title: Berserk
RED_BRUTALITY.description: At the start of your turn, lose 1 HP and draw {RedBrutalityPower:diff()} cards.
RED_BRUTALITY.title: Brutality
GREEN_WRAITH_FORM.description:
Gain {IntangiblePower:diff()} [gold]Intangible[/gold].
At the start of each turn, lose {WraithFormPower:diff()} [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
GREEN_WRAITH_FORM.title: Wraith Form
GREEN_PHANTASMAL_KILLER.description: Next turn, your Attacks deal double damage.
GREEN_PHANTASMAL_KILLER.title: Phantasmal Killer
GREEN_CALCULATED_GAMBLE.description:
Discard your entire [gold]hand[/gold],
then draw that many cards.
GREEN_CALCULATED_GAMBLE.title: Calculated Gamble
GREEN_DOPPELGANGER.description: Next turn, draw {Cards:diff()} cards and gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
GREEN_DOPPELGANGER.title: Doppelganger
GREEN_FLYING_KNEE.title: Flying Knee
GREEN_GLASS_KNIFE.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage twice. Each time this card is played, permanently reduce its base damage by 2 this combat.
GREEN_GLASS_KNIFE.title: Glass Knife
GREEN_SNEAKY_STRIKE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If you have discarded a card this turn, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
GREEN_SNEAKY_STRIKE.title: Sneaky Strike
GREEN_EVISCERATE.description:
Costs {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} less for each card discarded this turn.
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage 3 times.
GREEN_EVISCERATE.title: Eviscerate
GREEN_ALL_OUT_ATTACK.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Discard a random [gold]card[/gold].
GREEN_ALL_OUT_ATTACK.title: All-Out Attack
GREEN_ENDLESS_AGONY.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Whenever you draw this card, add a copy of it into your [gold]hand[/gold].
GREEN_ENDLESS_AGONY.title: Endless Agony
GREEN_CHOKE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Whenever you play a card this turn, the enemy loses {GreenChokePower:diff()} HP.
GREEN_CHOKE.title: Choke
GREEN_A_THOUSAND_CUTS.description: Whenever you play a card, deal {GreenAThousandCutsPower:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
GREEN_A_THOUSAND_CUTS.title: A Thousand Cuts
GREEN_BANE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If the enemy is [gold]Poisoned[/gold], deal {Damage:diff()} damage again.
GREEN_BANE.title: Bane
GREEN_DIE_DIE_DIE.title: Die Die Die
GREEN_RIDDLE_WITH_HOLES.title: Riddle With Holes
GREEN_TERROR.title: Terror
GREEN_VENOMOLOGY.title: Venomology
GREEN_QUICK_SLASH.title: Quick Slash
GREEN_HEEL_HOOK.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If the enemy is [gold]Weak[/gold], gain {Energy:energyIcons()} and draw 1 card.
GREEN_HEEL_HOOK.title: Heel Hook
GREEN_MASTERFUL_STAB.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Costs {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} more whenever you take damage.
GREEN_MASTERFUL_STAB.title: Masterful Stab
GREEN_UNLOAD.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Discard all non-Attack cards.
GREEN_UNLOAD.title: Unload
GREEN_CONCENTRATE.title: Concentrate
GREEN_CRIPPLING_POISON.title: Crippling Poison
GREEN_CATALYST.title: Catalyst
GREEN_CORPSE_EXPLOSION.description:
Apply {PoisonPower:diff()} [gold]Poison[/gold].
When that enemy dies, deal damage equal to its max HP to ALL enemies.
GREEN_CORPSE_EXPLOSION.title: Corpse Explosion
RED_DUAL_WIELD.description: Choose an Attack or Power card. Add {IfUpgraded:show:{Cards} copies|a copy} of it into your [gold]hand[/gold].
RED_DUAL_WIELD.title: Dual Wield
RED_ENTRENCH.title: Entrench
RED_CLASH.description:
Can only be played if every card in your [gold]hand[/gold] is an Attack.
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
RED_CLASH.title: Clash
GREEN_OUTMANEUVER.title: Outmaneuver
GREEN_DISTRACTION.description: Add a random Skill to your [gold]hand[/gold]. It costs 0 this turn.
GREEN_DISTRACTION.title: Distraction
GREEN_CALTROPS.description: Whenever you are attacked, deal {ThornsPower:diff()} damage back.
GREEN_CALTROPS.title: Caltrops
BLUE_AGGREGATE.description: Gain {Energy:energyIcons()} for every {Cards:diff()} cards in your draw pile.
BLUE_AGGREGATE.title: Aggregate
BLUE_AUTO_SHIELDS.title: Auto Shields
BLUE_BLIZZARD.title: Blizzard
BLUE_BLIZZARD.description: Deal damage equal to {Times:diff()} times the number of [gold]Frost Channeled[/gold] this combat to ALL enemies. ({Repeat:diff()})
BLUE_BULLSEYE.title: Bullseye
BLUE_CONSUME.title: Consume
BLUE_DOOM_AND_GLOOM.title: Doom and Gloom
BLUE_DOOM_AND_GLOOM.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Channel 1 [gold]Dark[/gold].
BLUE_FORCE_FIELD.title: Force Field
BLUE_FORCE_FIELD.description:
Costs 1 less {Energy:energyIcons()} for each Power card player this combat.
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
BLUE_HEATSINKS.title: Heatsinks
BLUE_HEATSINKS.description: Whenever you play a Power card, draw {Cards:diff()} card(s).
BLUE_MELTER.title: Melter
BLUE_MELTER.description:
Remove all [gold]Block[/gold] from the enemy.
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
BLUE_RECURSION.title: Recursion
BLUE_RECURSION.description: [gold]Evoke[/gold] your next Orb. [gold]Channel[/gold] the Orb that was just [gold]Evoked[/gold].
BLUE_STEAM_BARRIER.title: Steam Barrier
BLUE_STEAM_BARRIER.description: Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. Decrease this card's [gold]Block[/gold] by 1 this combat.
BLUE_STREAMLINE.title: Streamline
BLUE_STREAMLINE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Reduce this card's cost by 1 this combat.
BLUE_RECYCLE.title: Recycle
BLUE_RECYCLE.description: [gold]Exhaust[/gold] a card. Gain {Energy:energyIcons()} equal to its cost.
BLUE_REINFORCED_BODY.title: Reinforced Body
BLUE_REPROGRAM.title: Reprogram
BLUE_SEEK.title: Seek
BLUE_SEEK.description:
Put {Cards:diff()} card(s) from your draw pile into your hand.
[gold]Exhaust[/gold]
